judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit all four expectations with equivalent evidence and grounding; they are comparable.

report_1.evidence: **2FA "enabled for every clinic by default" is false.** `app/security/config.py` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... **PDF visit-history export does not exist.** `app/routers/visits.py` has only `list_visits` returning `[]` and a literal `# TODO: pdf export`. There is no `/visits/export` route ... **Must be removed.**

report_2.evidence: **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default." — FALSE.** `app/security/config.py` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... **"Export your visit history … Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF." — FALSE.** `app/routers/visits.py` returns an empty list (`return []`) and carries the comment `# TODO: pdf export`. The feature is not implemented. This section (and its image reference) must be removed.

report_1.evidence: The "after" image `after_scheduling.png` does not show the scheduling calendar — it renders the text **"BILLING / INVOICES"**, and `captures.json` confirms it was captured from route `/billing/invoices`, not `/schedule`.

report_2.evidence: `captures.json` maps `before_scheduling.png` to route `/schedule` and `after_scheduling.png` to route `/billing/invoices`. ... the "after" image reads **"BILLING / INVOICES"** — an unrelated screen. The "after" does not show the redesigned calendar at all

report_1.evidence: **`after_export.png` — referenced (line 26) but missing.** No such file in `img/` ... **`unused_capture_07.png` — exists but is orphaned** (content "PATIENT LIST", not referenced by the doc and not in `captures.json`).

report_2.evidence: **`after_export.png` — referenced in the doc, but no file exists.** ... **`unused_capture_07.png` — exists but is referenced nowhere.** It shows "PATIENT LIST"; it's an orphaned asset.

report_1.evidence: **Footer line "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance." (line 33)** is an internal drafting note; remove it from customer-facing copy.

report_2.evidence: **The footer "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** — An internal drafting/attribution artifact. ... as written it should not go out.
